programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When an Army sergeant home on leave is gun downed on New Year’s Eve, police suspect the straight-arrow soldier may have been killed over beef with someone from his past. But an unexpected tip puts investigators on the trail of an off-limits romance.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a man is fatally stabbed in his home, police think they have a slam-dunk case when his live-in girlfriend identifies the man she saw fleeing the scene with a bloody knife. The problem is, detectives can’t find physical evidence to confirm her story. Could she be in danger herself, or is there a web of lies about to unravel?

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a corrections officer is found dead in his apartment, police wonder if a former inmate got revenge on him. But it’s soon clear that the murder may not be related to his job, once police uncover their victim’s part in a dangerous love triangle.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a father and daughter are found murdered in their home, police are left with more questions than answers. But as detectives dig deeper into the case, they uncover a chilling motive that questions a mother’s instincts – and destroys a famil

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: Two Americans fall madly in love abroad, but back home, tragedy strikes when one of them is found dead in their home. But who is to blame for this heinous crime? The truth blurs the line between perpetrator and victim.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When the bound body of a missing man is recovered from the river, foul play is immediately obvious. Detectives quickly uncover a dangerous love triangle, hidden bloodstains, and an informant who will bring the sick truth to light.
